The parametric hotel lobby is a sleek and modern space with plenty of natural light. The lobby is spacious and open with a variety of seating options. The front desk is a sleek white counter with a parametric design. The walls are a light blue color with parametric patterns. The floor is a light wood color with a parametric design. There are plenty of plants and flowers throughout the space. prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.

num_images.title: Num Images
num_images.description: The number of images to generate.

image_size.title: Image Size
image_size.description: The size of the generated image.

style.title: Style
style.description: The style to apply to the image.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.description: The scheduler to use for the model.

sync_mode.title: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description:
If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded
            before returning the response. This will increase the latency of the function but
            it allows you to get the image directly in the response without going through the CDN.

guidance_scale.title: Guidance scale (CFG)
guidance_scale.description:
The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.

num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps
num_inference_steps.description: The number of inference steps to perform.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description:
The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.

examples: cartoon, illustration, animation. face. male, female
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description:
The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).

enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker
enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The prompt used for generating the image.

timings.title: Timings
timings.description: The timings of the different steps of the generation process.

has_nsfw_concepts.title: Has Nsfw Concepts
has_nsfw_concepts.description: Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description:
Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

height.title: Height
height.description: The height of the generated image.

width.title: Width
width.description: The width of the generated image.

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

height.title: Height
height.description: The height of the image in pixels.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

width.title: Width
width.description: The width of the image in pixels.

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.
